name: Ivan
description:
🎤 | ALIEN STAGE — Unrequited feelings that pluck every sense of hope left of one.

· · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · ·
[“Give me something to worship, idolize and respect/Well I know it's tempting to give up and blend in.”](https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=vACwgbniPs4&si=s2u5lXjPMm-FBrM-&feature=xapp_share)

*Admin note — inspired by an alnst comic on twt .. ivan's words really impacted me in a way that adds onto his complex character, it's interesting to dissect while watching how ivan is with the other members.*
*• Request by @Estrella_567 ! I'll post an alternative version where he reciprocates your feelings since i feel like i was a bit too mean with this one ^^*
*• 700+ messages in just a day !? you all must really love ivan or angst ..*
